message:
fix(packs): close global-flags bypass across remaining CLI-prefix packs

Tenth sweep of the `<cli>\s+<sub>` class-bug. These packs all allowed a
destructive command to evade the guard by inserting a global flag between
the CLI name and the service/subcommand:

- system/services: systemctl -H host stop sshd
- loadbalancer/{nginx,haproxy,traefik}: systemctl --user stop nginx
- cdn/cloudfront: aws --profile prod cloudfront delete-distribution
- cdn/fastly: fastly --token X service delete
- cdn/cloudflare_workers: wrangler --env prod d1 delete my-db
- dns/route53: aws --profile prod route53 delete-hosted-zone
- apigateway/{aws,apigee,kong}: aws --profile prod apigateway delete-rest-api
- email/ses: aws --profile prod ses delete-identity
- featureflags/{unleash,split,launchdarkly,flipt}: token/project flags

Transform: `<cli>\s+<sub>` -> `<cli>(?:\s+--?\S+(?:\s+\S+)?)*\s+<sub>` for
single-name CLIs (structured flag-aware form), or `<cli>\b.*?\b<sub>` for
aws/gcloud where service name follows arbitrary global flags.

All fixes include regression tests demonstrating the bypass is closed and
that safe read-only commands with global flags still short-circuit safely.

2166 tests passing.

+
+    #[test]
+    fn global_flags_do_not_bypass() {
+        let pack = create_pack();
+        // gcloud supports --project, --quiet, --verbosity, etc. before the command group.
+        // apigeecli supports --token, --org, --config, etc. before the subcommand.
+        assert_blocks_with_pattern(
+            &pack,
+            "gcloud --project my-project apigee apis delete my-api",
+            "gcloud-apigee-apis-delete",
+        );
+        assert_blocks_with_pattern(
+            &pack,
+            "gcloud --quiet --project p apigee organizations delete my-org",
+            "gcloud-apigee-organizations-delete",
+        );
+        assert_blocks_with_pattern(
+            &pack,
+            "apigeecli --token abc apis delete --name my-api",
+            "apigeecli-apis-delete",
+        );
+        assert_blocks_with_pattern(
+            &pack,
+            "apigeecli --org my-org envs delete --name prod",
+            "apigeecli-envs-delete",
+        );
+        assert!(
+            pack.check("gcloud --project p apigee apis list").is_none(),
+            "safe list with global flag should remain safe"
+        );
+        assert!(
+            pack.check("apigeecli --token abc apis list").is_none(),
+            "safe list with token flag should remain safe"
+        );
+    }
 }
